source:
Reports unresolved packages in @ComponentScan annotations and corresponding aliased attributes of @ComponentScan meta annotations.

Example:


  @ComponentScan(basePackages = {
     "com.my.company",
     "com.unknown" // reports "'Cannot resolve package 'unknown'"
  }) +
  @Configuration +
  public class MyConfiguration {}
target:
Meldet nicht auflösbare Pakete in @ComponentScan- Annotationen und in den entsprechenden Alias-Attributen von @ComponentScan-Meta-Annotationen.

Beispiel:


  @ComponentScan(basePackages = {
     "com.my.company",
     "com.unknown" // meldet "'Cannot resolve package 'unknown'"
  }) +
  @Configuration +
  public class MyConfiguration {}

source: Jasper process finished with exit code {0}
Disconnect from the selected remote server

Reports calls to non-generic-array manipulation methods like Arrays.fill() with mismatched argument types. Such calls don't do anything useful and are likely to be mistakes.

Example:


  int foo(String[] strings) {
    return Arrays.binarySearch(strings, 1);
  }

New in 2017.2
target:
Meldet Aufrufe von nicht generischen Array-Manipulations-Methoden wie Arrays.fill() mit unpassenden Argument-Typen. Solche Aufrufe leisten meist nichts Sinnvolles und sind wahrscheinlich Fehler.

Beispiel:


  int foo(String[] strings) {
    return Arrays.binarySearch(strings, 1);
  }

Neu in 2017.2
